rationale: The page provides a visual summary of film award winners, specifically highlighting the movie '12th Fail' and actors Shah Rukh Khan, Vikrant Massey, and Rani Mukerji. It serves as a brief informational record of recent cultural achievements in Indian cinema.
cleanedText:
Best Feature Film
Movie: 12th Fail
Director: Vidhu Vinod Chopra
Tagline: Haar Nahi Maanunga (I will not give up)
Award Winners:
- Shah Rukh Khan: Best Actor
- Vikrant Massey: Best Actor
- 12th Fail: Feature Film
- Rani Mukerji: Best Actress
